---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Describe the problem or workflow this would solve.
(e.g. "When testing SetMetadataConfiguration, I have to manually copy values from the Get* response...")

## Proposed Solution
How you imagine the feature working.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references (e.g. ONVIF spec section).
